title: v0 by Vercel
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder — generates React/Next.js apps from natural language with database integrations.

title: Ntsc-rs - Open-Source VHS/Analog TV Effects
description: Rust-based video emulator that adds authentic analog TV and VHS artifacts. Runs in-browser or as a library.
notes: 402 points on HN today. Could be sick for YouTube thumbnails or intro effects - retro VHS vibes without After Effects. Open-source Rust too.
